form.formComment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by 2 lengths at this track over 300m (17.74) beating Stitched Up Lucy in Grade 5 on April 11. Can continue the winning form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by 2 lengths at this track over 300m (17.74) beating Stitched Up Lucy in Grade 5 on April 11. Can continue the winning form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room rounding the first turn.
Was bumped on the hindquarters in the back straight.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by one length at this track over 300m (17.85) beating Fab Prince in Maiden on April 6. The one to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by one length at this track over 300m (17.85) beating Fab Prince in Maiden on April 6. The one to beat again.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won by one length at this track (18.39) beating Park Key Pop in a Grade 5 on February 15. Solid claims this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won by one length at this track (18.39) beating Park Key Pop in a Grade 5 on February 15. Solid claims this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was awkwardly placed on heels entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 300m at this track. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 300m at this track. Others make more appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked out across heels and lost ground rounding the first turn.
Slow to begin; Was continually bumped on the hindquarters in the back straight.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won comfortably by 3.5 lengths at this track (17.73) beating Our Hedley in a Grade 5 on April 6. Not up to this.

Was bumped heavily on the hindquarters shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (17.87) over 300m at this track. Has to do a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when third (17.87) over 300m at this track. Has to do a bit more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was bumped on the hindquarters and became unbalanced rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.21) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 9 lengths. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when third behind Remission Run at this track last start over 300m (17.70). Has to be respected.
